stop_ship.issue: Pass-1 docs claim APPROVED/EXECUTION-READY status without authoritative approval
stop_ship.required_fix: Replace status language with gate-based evidence requirements; remove approval claims

stop_ship.issue: Langfuse compliance drift (cloud fallback allowed without labeling noncompliance)
stop_ship.required_fix: Make self-hosted Langfuse at :3001 a Phase-1 DoD gate; label cloud fallback as dev-only and noncompliant

stop_ship.issue: Plaintext-at-rest risk is not converted into a deterministic hard gate
stop_ship.required_fix: Implement PII canary gate scanning logs/traces/DB and fail closed before production exposure

stop_ship.issue: Plans reference non-existent gate scripts/tests without an explicit creation contract
stop_ship.required_fix: Consolidate gates into bring_up_tests.sh or explicitly create every referenced script with artifacts + PASS markers

stop_ship.issue: Unverified infra assumptions treated as facts (e.g., RAG REST healthy)
stop_ship.required_fix: Mark as UNVERIFIED and add contract probe gates that write artifacts

contradictions.resolution_rule: Decision Lock wins: Langfuse must be self-hosted at :3001 for Phase-1 DoD
QA observed auth semantics: missing/invalid claims -> 401; insufficient role -> 403
Scaffold plan wins per authority order: retrieval is exclusively via RAG REST; Agent must not query pgvector directly

missing.gap: No proof tools hit real Deal API vs mocks
missing.fix: Add a no-mocks gate (ALLOW_TOOL_MOCKS=false) and verify Deal API state change + record artifact

missing.gap: No contract probes for Deal API / RAG REST / MCP
missing.fix: Implement container-side probe scripts that write contract artifacts under gate_artifacts

missing.gap: Audit immutability is not proven with DB-level enforcement gate
missing.impact: Audit trail can be tampered with
missing.fix: Add DB rule + gate script that attempts UPDATE/DELETE and expects failure

missing.gap: No-raw-content policy is not end-to-end across logs/traces/DB
missing.fix: Add PII canary gates scanning logs/traces/DB and fail closed

gate_problems.gate: Referenced scripts (ports/env lint, soak, queue, routing, etc.)
gate_problems.problem: Many are not present in repo; gates are not runnable
gate_problems.fix: Consolidate into bring_up_tests.sh or create scripts with deterministic artifacts and non-zero exit on failure

gate_problems.problem: Some plans allow cloud fallback without labeling noncompliance
gate_problems.fix: Require self-hosted :3001 health + trace creation as Phase-1 DoD; treat cloud as dev-only
